name: skill-agent-eval-platform
description: Skill & Agent evaluation platform using Harbor + promptfoo

scripts.eval:skills: promptfoo eval -c evals/skills/trigger-accuracy.yaml && promptfoo eval -c evals/skills/protocol-compliance.yaml && promptfoo eval -c evals/skills/safety.yaml
scripts.eval:agents: promptfoo eval -c evals/agents/integrator-compliance.yaml && promptfoo eval -c evals/agents/owner-compliance.yaml && promptfoo eval -c evals/agents/mode-adherence.yaml
